PROPOSED STUDY PLAN
✓ Auto-saved
AP Physics 1: Algebra-Based Confidence Builder
Subject: Physics
Framework: AP (Advanced Placement)
Estimated hours: 104h
UNITS
1. Foundations & Math Confidence
Physics vocabulary and units
Metric system and conversions
Algebraic manipulation without fear
Graphing basics and visual intuition
h
2. Kinematics
Scalars vs. Vectors
Displacement, velocity, and acceleration
Position-time and velocity-time graphs
Kinematic equations for constant acceleration
Free fall
h
3. Dynamics
Force and mass
Newton's Three Laws of Motion
Free-body diagrams
Friction and normal force
Applications of Newton's Laws
h
4. Circular Motion and Gravitation
Uniform circular motion
Centripetal acceleration and force
Vertical circles
Newton's Law of Universal Gravitation
Gravitational fields
h
5. Energy
Work and mechanical work
Kinetic energy and potential energy
Conservation of energy
Power
Work-energy theorem
h
6. Momentum
Linear momentum
Impulse and momentum change
Conservation of momentum
Elastic and inelastic collisions
Center of mass
h
7. Simple Harmonic Motion
Period and frequency
Restoring forces
Pendulum motion
Mass-spring systems
Amplitude and energy in SHM
h
8. Torque and Rotational Motion
Torque and lever arms
Rotational inertia
Rotational kinematics
Angular momentum
Conservation of angular momentum
h
9. Exam Prep & FRQ Strategy
FRQ paragraph argument requirements
Multi-step problem breakdown strategies
MCQ pacing and process of elimination
Full practice exam review
h
